mano_cua.result_summary: 硅相关物品图标本身正常，但Silicon Ore采矿机器图标在3处异常：(1)工厂列表机器列显示物品图标替代机器图标 (2)汇总行Total row显示破损图片占位符且无机器名称 (3)步骤面板Sources行机器图标完全缺失
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Based on comprehensive testing: Silicon Ore, High-purity Silicon, Crystal Silicon item icons all display correctly. However Silicon Ore mining machine icon is broken/missing in factory list machine column (shows item icon instead), Total row (shows broken placeholder), and step panel Sources row (icon completely absent). This is a visual rendering bug affecting mining machine icons for Silicon Ore.
